examples: Tell her she has been most bounteous and our gratitude is extreme.
November is for Thanksgiving, count God's bounteous graces.
Plant wheat or soyabeans in the fertile pampas and they will produce bounteous crops.
At Majdac, the granny, Anica, sighs and tuts as she clears away the leftovers from a bounteous dinner.
Britain does not have a technology-focused venture-capital industry anything like as bounteous as that which serves Silicon Valley.
